LanguageData.FCP_Production_Ammo_Press.label: ammo press
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Armor_Workbench.label: armor workbench
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Chemistry_Workbench.label: chemistry workbench
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Clean_Table_Terminal.desc: A well-maintained pre-war computer terminal on a stand. Can be used to research holotapes. Can be moved and claimed.
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Clean_Wall_Terminal.descr: A well-preserved pre-war computer terminal mounted to a wall. Can be used to research holotapes and may still contain data from before the war. Cannot be moved or claimed once placed.
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Clean_Wall_Terminal.label: Clean Wall Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Complex_Weapons_Workbench: A workbench for making complex weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Cooking_Station_Fueled_Co: A cooking station fueled with wood.
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Cooking_Station_Fueled_Si: A cooking station fueled with wood.
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Fabrication_Workbench.des: A workbench equipped with advanced tools for producing technological marvels from simpler materials.
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Old_Table_Terminal.descri: A weathered pre-war computer terminal on a stand. Can be used to research holotapes. Can be moved and claimed.
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Old_Table_Terminal.label: Old Table Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Old_Wall_Terminal.descrip: A rusted pre-war computer terminal mounted to a wall. Can be used to research holotapes and may still contain data from before the war. Cannot be moved or claimed once placed.
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Old_Wall_Terminal.label: Old Wall Terminal
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Portable_Tool_Bench.label: portable tool bench
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Tailoring_Workbench.descr: A workbench for tailoring clothes by hand. Works at 50% of the speed of an electric tailoring bench.
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Tailoring_Workbench.label: tailoring workbench
LanguageData.FCP_Production_Tool_Bench.label: tool bench
